span.p: YES — SSR, SSR+RSC, BFF, or a server callback route

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: NO — pure static SPA, no server in the loop

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: YES — Supabase JS, Auth0 SPA SDK

span.p: Does the app have a server component handling requests for authenticated users?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Use supabase-ssr createServerClient in the OAuth callback route; tokens in HttpOnly cookies set by the server

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Use the provider SSR SDK; exchange code server-side; set session cookie server-side

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Does the SPA use a managed provider SDK?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Provider SDK manages token in memory + silent refresh; never touch localStorage

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Authorization Code + PKCE; access token in memory only; no localStorage

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Add CSRF defense — SameSite=Lax + anti-CSRF token on writes

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Note: access token lost on page reload; provider SDK handles silent re-auth via the HttpOnly cookie the provider sets
